title: URL that Redirects users to their monday account with your app listing page open
excerpt: Hey there! Was developing some customer onboarding email sequences, and wanted to redirect the clicker of the CTA back to their monday account, but with our app listing page open. Specifically since the clicker would hav…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! Was developing some customer onboarding email sequences, and wanted to redirect the clicker of the CTA back to their monday account, but with our app listing page open. Specifically since the clicker would have the app installed already, so the install link doesn’t work great. @dipro Checked with the dev team who confirmed that it’s not currently possible.

I think this would be useful especially to send users to maybe the pricing page, or to the How to Use embed of the your app but in their account so it’s easy for the user to hit the “Use app” button and re-engage.

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the request @liambailey !

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re interested in the embedded marketplace, then the URL is fairly easy to construct provided you have the account_slug and app_id:

const url: string = `https://${account_slug}.monday.com/marketplace/v2/app/installed/${app_id}`;

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I was playing around this a bit. I think it may work. I’m using MailChimp for customer onboarding sequences. I’ll have to setup the account slug and the app id to come through to MailChimp, then I’ll try to use those fields dynamically as ‘Merge Tags’ within the link. I’ll report back if I can figure it out.
